articles.author: Jack Wittels
articles.title: Europe Has Enough Jet Fuel For Coming Weeks as Stocks Pressured - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Europe is expected to have enough jet fuel to avoid shortages in April, according to people directly involved in the aviation fuel market. But that situation could change in May, as the conflict in the Middle East continues to rock global energy markets.
